intellect_insights.title: DG Outperforming Search on CPL
intellect_insights.observation: DG CPL ₹1437 vs Search CPL ₹3374 — DG is 30%+ cheaper
intellect_insights.recommendation: Consider shifting 10-15% budget from generic search to top DG campaigns

intellect_insights.title: CVR Disparity Across Campaigns
intellect_insights.observation: Best CVR: DM_Branded_Search_11th_June_20 (5.38%) vs Worst: DM_Search_Location_Specific_Ra (0.98%)
intellect_insights.recommendation: Investigate why DM_Search_Location_Specific_Ra has low CVR — likely audience quality or keyword intent mismatch

intellect_insights.title: CPL Exceeds Alert Threshold — Check Day-Parting
intellect_insights.recommendation: Pull hourly/day-of-week report from Google Ads UI. Reduce bids or pause ad schedule during high-CPL hours (typically weekends for B2B).

intellect_insights.title: DG Conversion Rate Critically Low
intellect_insights.observation: DG CVR 0.2% is less than half of Search CVR 3.3%
intellect_insights.recommendation: Audit DG landing pages. Consider DG-specific landing pages with softer CTAs (webinar, guide) vs hard lead form.

recommendations.detail: 2 ad groups in 'DM_Branded_Search_11th_June_2024 #d2r|dt7-dm_branded_search_11th_june_2024' with <50 weekly impressions each. Combined: 507 impressions, 5.0 conversions, ₹13,822 spend. Too fragmented for smart bidding to optimize.
recommendations.action: Merge 2 low-volume ad groups into one. Consolidates conversion data for better bidding signals. Combine best-performing keywords and ad copy from each.
recommendations.expected_impact: More conversion data per ad group -> exits learning limited faster, better bid optimization
recommendations.execution_note: Requires merging keywords, ad copy, and pausing old ad groups
